base.db_info: SELECT name, db_unique_name, dbid, platform_name, cdb FROM v$database
base.container_name: SELECT sys_context('userenv','con_name') AS container_name FROM dual
base.directory_list: SELECT directory_name, directory_path FROM dba_directories ORDER BY directory_name
base.non_maintained_users: SELECT username FROM dba_users WHERE oracle_maintained = 'N' AND account_status LIKE 'OPEN%' AND common = 'NO' ORDER BY username
base.schemas_all: SELECT username, oracle_maintained FROM dba_users WHERE account_status LIKE 'OPEN%' ORDER BY username
base.non_temp_tablespaces: SELECT tablespace_name FROM dba_tablespaces WHERE contents = 'PERMANENT' AND tablespace_name NOT IN ('SYSTEM','SYSAUX','TEMP') ORDER BY tablespace_name
base.nls_info: SELECT parameter, value FROM nls_database_parameters WHERE parameter IN ('NLS_CHARACTERSET','NLS_NCHAR_CHARACTERSET')
base.db_role_open_mode_base: SELECT database_role, open_mode, protection_mode, protection_level, switchover_status FROM v$database
base.rac_info: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 1 THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END AS rac, COUNT(*) AS instance_count FROM gv$instance
base.version_banners: SELECT banner_full FROM v$version ORDER BY banner_full
base.container_context: SELECT sys_context('userenv','con_name') AS con_name, sys_context('userenv','con_id') AS con_id, sys_context('userenv','cdb_name') AS cdb_name FROM dual
base.current_container_details: SELECT con_id, name, open_mode, restricted, open_time FROM v$containers WHERE con_id = sys_context('userenv','con_id')

logical_offline_extra.streams_pool_size: SELECT value AS streams_pool_size_bytes FROM v$parameter WHERE name = 'streams_pool_size'

physical_common.archivelog_force_logging: SELECT log_mode, force_logging, flashback_on FROM v$database
physical_common.db_edition_banner: SELECT banner_full FROM v$version WHERE banner_full LIKE 'Oracle Database%'
physical_common.spfile_in_use: SELECT value AS spfile FROM v$parameter WHERE name = 'spfile'
physical_common.compatible_param: SELECT value AS compatible FROM v$parameter WHERE name = 'compatible'
physical_common.db_block_size: SELECT value AS db_block_size FROM v$parameter WHERE name = 'db_block_size'
physical_common.db_nk_cache_sizes: SELECT name, value FROM v$parameter WHERE name LIKE 'db\_%k\_cache\_size' ESCAPE '\\' ORDER BY name
physical_common.tde_wallet_status: SELECT wallet_type, status, wallet_order, fully_backed_up FROM v$encryption_wallet

physical_online_extra.db_role_open_mode: SELECT database_role, open_mode, protection_mode, protection_level, switchover_status FROM v$database
physical_online_extra.redo_logs: SELECT thread#, group#, bytes, status, archived FROM v$log ORDER BY thread#, group#
physical_online_extra.standby_redo_logs: SELECT thread#, group#, bytes, status FROM v$standby_log ORDER BY thread#, group#
physical_online_extra.dg_params: SELECT name, value FROM v$parameter WHERE name IN ('db_unique_name','log_archive_config','fal_server','fal_client') OR name LIKE 'log_archive_dest_%' ORDER BY name

hybrid_offline_extra.permanent_tablespaces_details: SELECT tablespace_name, bigfile, contents, block_size, encrypted FROM dba_tablespaces WHERE contents='PERMANENT' ORDER BY tablespace_name
hybrid_offline_extra.sqlpatch_35564253: SELECT patch_id, action, status, description, action_time FROM dba_registry_sqlpatch WHERE patch_id = 35564253 ORDER BY action_time
